text_block_list.text: I spot Narita Brian at the academy after a break.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I went out to the sticks for a student council
inspection.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But the president can't pass up a good time. She's
got to sample the local cuisine, visit the hot
springs, yada yada...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
An "inspection," she called it... Can you believe
that?

It seems like Narita Brian had a nice, relaxing
time with her friends.
